title: funkia cordata
intro: Funkia cordata, also known as Ligularia cordata, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory and skin conditions. Funkia cordata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
